R0239.title: Affiliate Commission Fraud
R0239.definition: Channels use cookie stuffing, fake traffic, or landing-page hijacking to obtain commissions improperly.
R0239.description: Channels use cookie stuffing, fake traffic, or landing-page hijacking to obtain commissions improperly.
R0239.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
